# Base Kanban Stage State

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:4c2b9e0aa0f17a6e3b4db1cf3fd30494a901151d2481228ac2de6b841282ac30
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module extends the functionality of base_kanban_stage to allow you to
map stages from base_kanban_stage to states. The states are:

- New (draft)
- In Progress (open)
- Pending (pending)
- Done (done)
- Cancelled (cancelled)
- Exception (exception)

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```
